# source: live tmux capture of pi resume with bogus session id in testingmurderharness/
# pi version: 0.78.1
# invocation forms tested:
#   (A) CLI: pi --session 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 -p "hello"
#   (B) CLI: pi --resume 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000  (--resume ignores id, opens picker TUI)
#   (C) TUI slash command: /resume, then type bogus UUID into picker search field
# state (A): exits immediately with one-line error on stderr, exit code 1
# state (B): --resume flag opens interactive session-picker TUI; the UUID arg is ignored
# state (C): in-TUI /resume opens same session-picker TUI; bogus UUID typed into search yields empty result
# scrub note: shell prompt lines (user@host:...$) removed; home path -> /home/user; email not present

# --- (A) CLI: pi --session <bogus-uuid> -p "hello" ---
# exits immediately with error, no TUI

No session found matching '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'

# --- (B) CLI: pi --resume <bogus-uuid>  (--resume ignores the id argument, opens picker TUI) ---
# user types bogus UUID into the picker's search field; "Current Folder" scope shows no results

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Resume Session (Current Folder)                                                                                                                      ◉ Current Folder | ○ All  Name: All  Sort: Threaded
tab scope · re:<pattern> regex · "phrase" exact
ctrl+s sort · ctrl+n named · ctrl+d delete · ctrl+p path (off)

> 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000

  No sessions in current folder. Press Tab to view all.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# --- (C) in-TUI /resume slash command, bogus UUID typed into picker search ---
# identical picker TUI; "Current Folder" scope returns no results for bogus UUID

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Resume Session (Current Folder)                                                                                                                      ◉ Current Folder | ○ All  Name: All  Sort: Threaded
tab scope · re:<pattern> regex · "phrase" exact
ctrl+s sort · ctrl+n named · ctrl+d delete · ctrl+p path (off) · ctrl+r rename

> 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000

  No sessions in current folder. Press Tab to view all.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness
0.0%/1.0M (auto)                                                                                                                             (or) deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash • medium
